project_type: Vite + React (JSX) single-page mind-map/canvas application with Tailwind CSS
test_command: No test command available - validate via build only
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to verify no compilation errors. Manual verification of UI changes would require running `npm run dev`.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns: single-file components, Tailwind CSS classes, lucide-react icons, useState/useEffect/useCallback hooks.
key_patterns: - All app state lives in App.jsx (5800+ lines single file). Timer state: showTimer, timerSeconds, timerRunning, timerPaused, timerDone, timerCustomMinutes. Timer functions: startTimer, pauseTimer, resumeTimer, resetTimer, formatTimerDisplay. Keyboard shortcuts use useEffect + window.addEventListener('keydown', handler) pattern with early returns for INPUT/TEXTAREA. Existing shortcuts: M=minimap, T=tasks, P=pins, R=reminders, S=sidebar, N=new card. Timer widget renders inside bottom-right floating panel at lines ~4984-5050. Toast notifications use fixed positioning with Tailwind animate-in classes. Reminder notifications use a queue system with auto-dismiss after 8 seconds.
directory_structure: src/App.jsx - main app component (5800 lines, all state/logic), src/ReminderPanel.jsx - reminder panel sidebar, src/MiniMap.jsx - mini map overlay, src/TaskPanel.jsx - task management panel, src/PinPanel.jsx - pin management panel, src/main.jsx - entry point, src/index.css - Tailwind base styles
